skills.name: hub
skills.short_description: list skills and set an optional session block target

skills.name: develop
skills.short_description: add or modify WordPress block code

modes.name: feature
modes.short_description: implement planned block behavior

modes.name: fix
modes.short_description: diagnose and repair a block defect

skills.name: feedback
skills.short_description: report a bug or idea about the plugin skills

skills.name: review
skills.short_description: review code for bugs, security, a11y, and tests

skills.name: validate
skills.short_description: create or run automated test suites

modes.name: php
modes.short_description: create or run PHP tests

modes.name: jest
modes.short_description: create or run Jest tests

modes.name: e2e
modes.short_description: create or run browser-driven tests

modes.name: all
modes.short_description: run PHP, Jest, and E2E sequentially

skills.name: verify
skills.short_description: confirm a change in the running app

modes.name: backlog
modes.short_description: build the personal and unimplemented-ADR backlog

modes.name: adr
modes.short_description: author, retire, inspect, and reconcile ADRs

modes.name: skill
modes.short_description: maintain plugin skills, references, scripts, and inventory

modes.name: details
modes.short_description: inspect live frontmatter and invocation settings

modes.name: review
modes.short_description: run the opt-in qualitative skill reviewer

modes.name: review-contrib
modes.short_description: review a proposed or incubating skill

modes.name: promote
modes.short_description: promote an accepted candidate

modes.name: sync
modes.short_description: reconcile skill inventories across docs and tests

modes.name: training
modes.short_description: study upstream patterns and apply relevant lessons

modes.name: retro
modes.short_description: capture reusable session lessons

modes.name: self-test
modes.short_description: run pytest contracts and deterministic plugin checks

modes.name: validate
modes.short_description: run structural validation; Tier 2 is opt-in

modes.name: docs
modes.short_description: regenerate portable guide+slides Markdown (publish is the optional final step)

modes.name: check
modes.short_description: report whether generated docs are stale vs. their sources (git hash)

modes.name: publish
modes.short_description: publish both by default; name one to publish only that output

modes.name: all
modes.short_description: run the deterministic maintainer health checks
